creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vitaly Magerya from comment #3)
Thanks!

I would have tagged this to MFH if 2015Q4 weren't about to branch in a day or so since it doesn't make sense to me to have a release in head and release candidate in the quarterly.  Since 2015Q4 is branching shortly I'll just leave it as so.
